error.name_already_exists: An entry with this name already exists. Please choose a different name.
error.coordinates_out_of_range: This integration only provides data for Germany. The selected location is outside the covered area.

data.unavailable_when_stale: Mark sensors unavailable when data is stale

data_description.rain_threshold: A forecast intensity above this value counts as precipitation for the RV start/end sensors. 0 means any DWD-detected rain.
data_description.start_end_mode: Whether the start/end sensors report the absolute time or the minutes until the event. The other value is exposed as an attribute.
